name: Swedish Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the coffee, vanilla, and cocoa to the mixture; stir well to combine.
3. Gradually add the rolled oats, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Form the dough into 1-inch balls and roll each ball in granulated sugar.
5. Place the coated balls on a cookie sheet and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before serving.
6. Store any leftover balls in an airtight container for later use.
Makes about 5 dozen.
